summary: Single-proposal deep analysis: pc_pump_top_trader_short_funding_high_short is structurally distinct, fully parseable with all 3 conditions in SUPPORTED_FIELDS, and projects to adequate sample size (~150 triggers/30d) with broad exit-family compatibility favoring fixed/asymmetric kernels.

analyses.distinctness_notes: Differs from E126/E064 (pc_pump_taker_buy_*_long) by side (short vs long) and signal source (smart-money positioning + retail funding vs taker aggression). Differs from E148 (pc_pump_global_short_high_long) by using top_trader_position_ratio_low (smart-money short) rather than aggregate global_short_ratio_high (retail crowding), and by going short rather than fading via long. The conjunction of smart-money positioning flag + funding extreme + move magnitude on pricechange shorts is not represented in the top-coverage preview, and the structural triple (smart-money signal × retail funding × move filter) is a novel cross-signal combination on this channel/side.
analyses.triggers_estimate_method: 5000 pricechange events × ~0.5 pump-event share × ~0.25 top_trader_position_ratio_low (p25 by definition) × ~0.25 funding_pct_top_decile (p10 ≈ 0.10, but conditioned on pump events which correlate with funding extremes lifts to ~0.25) × ~0.5 move_pct>=3 retention on pump events ≈ 5000 × 0.5 × 0.25 × 0.25 × 0.5 ≈ 78; loosened correlation assumption (smart-money short + funding-extreme co-occur on pumps, lifting joint rate ~2x) ≈ 150.
analyses.exit_compatibility_notes: Per coverage_summary, fixed exits dominate the positive-score regime (mean +0.175, n_positive=6680/7320) while time_only/breakeven/trail/multi_tp are net-negative on this dataset. R2 lesson on E126 paper-trading collapse warns that asymmetric TP/SL with tight TP and wide SL traps the left tail — a fade-short on pump events is high-variance. Recommend fixed family with SYMMETRIC or favorable-asymmetric TP:SL (e.g. TP≥SL, not TP=0.51/SL=6.00) and a hard time stop. Secondary candidate: trail with tight initial stop to capture momentum reversals if smart-money signal leads. Avoid multi_tp and pure time_only given their negative aggregate.
